Where you'll spend your time.

Drawn live on YouTube · Official Rules

The prize

What you win.

Four nights in a Strip-view suite at a 5-star property, round-trip flights, and resort credits toward shows and dining, built for a blowout weekend without coordinating logistics yourself.

  1. 1

    4 nights in a Strip-view suite at a 5-star hotel.

    Wake up to the Strip from your room, resort fees covered where applicable. We book dates with you within 90 days of the draw.

  2. 2

    Round-trip flights to Las Vegas.

    We coordinate airfare so you land ready to check in, not juggling separate flight and hotel bookings. Domestic US departure cities per winner packet.

  3. 3

    Dining & show credits included.

    Resort credits toward chef tables, Cirque-style shows, rooftop clubs, pool cabanas, and spa mornings, details spelled out in your winner packet.

Package specifications

  • DestinationLas Vegas, NV · The Strip
  • Duration4 nights
  • HotelStrip-view suite · 5-star
  • FlightsRound-trip included
  • CreditsDining · Shows · Experiences
  • DrawJuly 5, 2026 · 8pm ET
  • Total value$4,200

Lights up. Suite door opens. That's the whole plan.

Las Vegas · 4 Nights · Gaviom fulfillment

Common questions.

What exactly is included in the Vegas package?

Four nights in a Strip-view suite at a 5-star property, round-trip flights, resort fee coverage where applicable, and dining & show credits as specified in your winner packet. We handle booking coordination after you confirm dates.

Can I bring someone?

The package is designed for two guests in the suite. Flight arrangements follow the winner packet, contact us after the draw if you need to clarify party size.

Do I pick my travel dates?

Yes. After the draw we work with you on dates within the booking window in the official rules. Peak blackout dates may apply and are listed in the winner packet.

Is there a free way to enter?

Yes. US sweepstakes law requires it. Send a postcard per our AMOE instructions. One free entry per person per sweepstakes. Same odds as paid entries.

Which states is this open to?

Legal residents of 47 US states (excluding NY, FL and RI). Must be 18+ or the age of majority in your state. Void where prohibited.
